description: You are a macroeconomist studying inflation volatility. Estimate a GARCH(1,1) model for the 'inf' variable in the dataset /home/ga/Documents/gretl_data/usa.gdt using a constant in the mean equation. Create and execute a Gretl script at /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/garch_inflation.inp that performs this estimation, redirects the full model output to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/garch_output.txt, and saves the estimated conditional variance series ($h) and the inflation series to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/garch_cond_variance.csv.
